response: The levels of 25OH-VD, TNF-α, and TAC were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions and were read using a 96 well microplate ELISA reader. - The level of 25-OHVD was measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab213966, Abcam Inc.) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique. - The level of TNF-α was measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab46087, Abcam Inc.) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique. - The level of TAC was measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab65329, Abcam Inc.) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique.
